# Using Bunny

## Using Bunny

- [Welcome to Bunny](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/getting-started/welcome.md)
- [Superdesk - Sample SaaS Co.](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/getting-started/superdesk-sample-saas-co..md): Get to know our fictitious SaaS company that we use as a reference throughout the documentation.
- [Admin UI basics](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/admin-ui-basics.md)
- [Tables](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/admin-ui-basics/tables.md)
- [Forms](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/admin-ui-basics/forms.md)
- [Search (beta)](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/admin-ui-basics/search-beta.md)
- [User profile](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/user-profile.md)
- [Launchpad (beta)](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/launchpad-beta.md): The launchpad gives you quick access to things in Bunny that require your attention, such as recent quotes, upcoming renewals, draft and due invoices, and failed payments.
- [Product catalog](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog.md): The product catalog is the foundation of Bunny and where you define everything that your company sells: one-time fees, recurring subscriptions, usage-based pricing etc.
- [What's a product?](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/whats-a-product.md)
- [Product quick start](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/product-quick-start.md)
- [Products](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/products.md)
- [Features](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/features.md): Features decorate plans in Bunny's customer portal and are used for provisioning tenants in your platform.
- [Feature editor](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/feature-editor.md)
- [Plans](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/plans.md)
- [Add-ons](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/add-ons.md)
- [Price lists](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/price-lists.md)
- [Charges](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/charges.md)
- [One-time charges](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/charges/one-time-charges.md)
- [Recurring charges](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/charges/recurring-charges.md)
- [Usage-based charges](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/charges/usage-based-charges.md)
- [Coupons](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/coupons.md)
- [Categories](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/categories.md)
- [Platforms](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/platforms.md)
- [Tenants](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/product-catalog/tenants.md)
- [Customer management](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management.md)
- [Accounts](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management/accounts.md)
- [Contacts](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management/contacts.md)
- [Deals](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management/deals.md)
- [Subscriptions](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management/subscriptions.md)
- [Leads](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management/leads.md)
- [Campaigns](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-management/campaigns.md)
- [Subscription management](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/subscription-management.md)
- [What is a subscription?](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/subscription-management/what-is-a-subscription.md)
- [Subscription states](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/subscription-management/subscription-states.md)
- [Trial subscriptions](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/subscription-management/trial-subscriptions.md)
- [Quoting](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting.md)
- [What is a quote?](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/quotes.md)
- [Quote states](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/quote-states.md)
- [Quote builder](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/quote-builder.md)
- [Building a quote](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/building-a-quote.md)
- [Sharing a quote](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/sharing-a-quote.md)
- [Applying a quote](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/applying-a-quote.md)
- [Undoing a quote](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/undoing-a-quote.md)
- [Amendments](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/amendments.md)
- [Renewals](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/renewals.md)
- [Cancellations](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/cancellations.md)
- [Document templates](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/quoting/document-templates.md)
- [Approval workflows](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/approval-workflows.md): Approval workflows enable you to improve deal quality.
- [How approvals work](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/approval-workflows/how-approvals-work.md)
- [Approvers](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/approval-workflows/approvers.md)
- [Approval rules](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/approval-workflows/approval-rules.md)
- [Customer portal](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-portal.md): The portal where your customers view and accept quotes, pay invoices and manage their subscriptions.
- [Viewing quotes](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-portal/viewing-quotes.md)
- [Billing history](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-portal/billing-history.md)
- [Paying invoices](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-portal/paying-invoices.md)
- [Managing subscriptions](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-portal/managing-subscriptions.md)
- [Billing details](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/customer-portal/billing-details.md)
- [Billing](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing.md)
- [Billing day](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/billing-day.md)
- [Bill runs](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/bill-runs.md): The bill runs table shows all completed bill runs.
- [Invoices](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices.md)
- [Approve invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/approve-invoice.md)
- [Dequeue invoice from consolidation](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/dequeue-invoice-from-consolidation.md)
- [Download invoice PDF](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/download-invoice-pdf.md)
- [Edit invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/edit-invoice.md)
- [Email invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/email-invoice.md)
- [Merge invoices](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/merge-invoices.md)
- [Pay invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/pay-invoice.md)
- [Preview invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/preview-invoice.md)
- [Refund invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/refund-invoice.md)
- [Regenerate invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/regenerate-invoice.md)
- [Reissue invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/reissue-invoice.md)
- [Retry tax calculation](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/retry-tax-calculation.md)
- [Void invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/void-invoice.md)
- [Write off invoice](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/invoices/write-off-invoice.md)
- [Credit notes](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/credit-notes.md)
- [Price adjustments](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/price-adjustments.md)
- [Proration](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/proration.md)
- [Consolidated billing](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/consolidated-billing.md)
- [Currencies](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/currencies.md)
- [Sales tax and VAT](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/sales-tax-and-vat.md)
- [Payment methods and types](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/payment-methods-and-types.md)
- [Payment integrations](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/payment-integrations.md)
- [Usage records](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/usage-records.md): Bunny supports usage-based billing. Use the usage records table to inspect individual usage records as well as manually record usage.
- [Revenue movements](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/billing/revenue-movements.md)
- [Entities](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/entities.md): Operate multiple legal entities within a single Bunny instance.
- [Basics](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/entities/basics.md)
- [Invoices](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/entities/invoices.md): Customize your invoices for bank payments and international customers.
- [Quotes](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/entities/quotes.md)
- [Portal branding](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/entities/portal-branding.md)
- [Email branding](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/entities/email-branding.md)
- [Accounting](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/accounting.md): While Bunny is not a complete accounting solution like QuickBooks or Xero, Bunny is the system of record for all subscription revenue.
- [GL mappings](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/accounting/gl-mappings.md)
- [Journal entries](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/accounting/journal-entries.md)
- [Revenue recognition](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/accounting/revenue-recognition.md)
- [Intracom VAT summary](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/accounting/intracom-vat-summary.md): Bunny provides a monthly Intracom VAT report for EU based sellers
- [Workflows](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/workflows.md)
- [Analytics](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/analytics.md): Bunny comes standard with actionable analytics for all your revenue data.
- [Using analytics](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/analytics/using-analytics.md)
- [Trials](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/analytics/trials.md)
- [Monthly Recurring Revenue](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/analytics/monthly-recurring-revenue.md)
- [Collections](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/analytics/collections.md): Cash is king.
- [Access control](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/access-control.md): Bunny's access control
- [Users](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/access-control/users.md)
- [Roles](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/access-control/roles.md)
- [Groups](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/access-control/groups.md)
- [API clients](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/access-control/api-clients.md)
- [Settings](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings.md)
- [Company](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/company.md)
- [Custom fields](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/custom-fields.md)
- [Security](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/security.md)
- [Single sign-on](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/single-sign-on.md)
- [Migration mode](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/migration-mode.md)
- [Outbox](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/outbox.md)
- [Jobs](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/settings/jobs.md)
- [AI](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/ai.md): Three ways to put AI to work with Bunny: the built-in RevOps Agent, the MCP server for connecting your own AI client, and the Skills toolkit for AI-assisted development.
- [RevOps Agent](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/ai/revops-agent.md): Learn about what our RevOps agent can do.
- [MCP Server](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/ai/mcp-server.md)
- [Skills (Bunny AI Toolkit)](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/ai/skills-bunny-ai-toolkit.md): The Bunny AI Toolkit connects your AI coding assistant — Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenAI Codex, VS Code, and other compatible tools — directly to Bunny
- [License key management](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/tour/license-key-management.md): Bunny issues license keys which can be used for managing subscription entitlements in online or offline software and services.
- [Integrations](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations.md): Use Bunny's integrations with other applications to drive more automation and integration Bunny in your business processes.
- [Airbyte](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/airbyte.md): Synchronize Bunny data to other databases and systems via Airbyte.
- [Avalara AvaTax](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/avalara-avatax.md): Bunny has partnered with Avalara AvaTax to make it easy for you to calculate sales tax on quotes and invoices.
- [Bunny Sign](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/bunny-sign.md): Use Bunny's native e-signature solution to get signatures on quotes and sales proposals.
- [Docusign](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/docusign.md): Electronically sign quotes with DocuSign.
- [Dropbox Sign](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/dropbox-sign.md)
- [HubSpot](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/hubspot.md): Bunny's HubSpot integration enables you to easily create Bunny quotes from deals in HubSpot.
- [Kintsugi](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/kintsugi.md): "Put your sales tax on autopilot"
- [Mailchimp](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/mailchimp.md): Push contacts to Mailchimp.
- [QuickBooks](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/quickbooks.md): Integrate Bunny with QuickBooks for seamless SaaS revenue accounting.
- [PandaDoc](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/pandadoc.md): Coming soon.
- [Resend](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/resend.md): Connect your Resend account to ensure that all customer facing quotes and invoices are sent from Bunny using your own domain.
- [Salesforce](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/salesforce.md): Bunny's Salesforce integration synchronizes opportunities between Salesforce and Bunny.
- [SendGrid](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/sendgrid.md)
- [Slack](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/slack.md): Notify channels and users in Slack.
- [Stripe](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/stripe.md): Bunny has built-in support for credit card payments via Stripe.
- [Stripe Marketplace App](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/stripe-marketplace-app.md): Learn how to install the Bunny for Stripe app within your Stripe dashboard
- [Xero](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/xero.md): Integrate Bunny with Xero for seamless SaaS revenue accounting.
- [Zapier](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/integrations/zapier.md): Connect Bunny to Zapier to automate workflows
- [Single sign-on](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/single-sign-on.md): Learn how to set up single sign-on
- [SCIM user provisioning](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/scim-user-provisioning.md): Learn how to enable automated user provisioning
- [Migrating to Bunny](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/advanced-guides/migrating-to-bunny.md): Bunny offers a full migration service. We will help you every step of the way.
- [Pricing by number of users](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/best-practices/pricing-by-number-of-users.md)
- [Committed + overage pricing](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/best-practices/committed-+-overage-pricing.md)
- [Mar 12, 2026 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/mar-12-2026-release.md)
- [Feb 19, 2026 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/feb-19-2026-release.md)
- [Jan 22, 2026 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/jan-22-2026-release.md)
- [Dec 16, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/dec-16-2025-release.md)
- [Nov 20, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/nov-20-2025-release.md)
- [Nov 6, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/nov-6-2025-release.md)
- [Oct 28, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/oct-28-2025-release.md)
- [Oct 9, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/oct-9-2025-release.md)
- [Sep 24, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/sep-24-2025-release.md)
- [Aug 22, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/aug-22-2025-release.md)
- [Jul 3, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/jul-3-2025-release.md)
- [Jun 20, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/jun-20-2025-release.md)
- [Jun 5, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/jun-5-2025-release.md)
- [Older releases](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases.md)
- [2025 Releases](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases.md)
- [May 30, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases/may-30-2025-release.md)
- [May 23, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases/may-23-2025-release.md)
- [April 22, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases/april-22-2025-release.md)

- [Feb 13, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases/feb-13-2025-release.md)
- [Jan 24, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases/jan-24-2025-release.md)
- [Jan 16, 2025 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2025-releases/jan-16-2025-release.md)
- [2024 Releases](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2024-releases.md)
- [Dec 19, 2024 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2024-releases/dec-19-2024-release.md)
- [Dec 12, 2024 release](https://docs.bunny.com/guide/release-notes/older-releases/2024-releases/dec-12-2024-release.md)

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.bunny.com/guide/getting-started/welcome.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
